heading.prefix: Great products start with a solid

paragraph: Over the past 8+ years, I've grown from a Java developer into a Front-end Team Leader and UI/UX Designer, leading teams at Infostatus and Enouvo IT Solution while shipping products across Angular, React, and Tailwind CSS. I care as much about clean, maintainable code as I do about the interfaces people actually touch — which is why I sit comfortably between engineering and design. Based in Da Nang, Vietnam, I enjoy mentoring teams and turning ambiguous problems into products that just work.
